title: Amcor (AMCR) Down 7.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Amcor (AMCR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Amcor (AMCR) Steps Up Investment in ePac Flexible Packaging
text: Amcor (AMCR) is making an additional investment in ePac, in line with its vision to team up with high-growth companies to advance its initiatives in making the future of packaging more sustainable.

title: 4 S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat Dogs To Buy, 1 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of September 8, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 16.54%-36.34% topped by VFC & SWK.
